splits.title: Guide Lessons - Lesson IV: Home Economics - Spiritual Character Building in Childhood
splits.start_boundary: LESSON IV. Home Economics. Fourth Week in December.

files.notes: This file contains a single Guide Lessons article covering Lesson IV on Home Economics, specifically about spiritual character building in childhood. The content includes detailed guidance for mothers on teaching faith and spiritual values to children from infancy through adulthood, followed by administrative notices about magazine subscriptions and a Relief Society information bureau.
